scripts.build: npm run build:fidget && vite build --config vite/renderer.config.ts && vite build --config vite/main.config.ts && vite build --config vite/preload.config.ts
scripts.build:fidget: PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/rustup/bin:$PATH cargo build --manifest-path fidget/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen fidget/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/progred_fidget.wasm --out-dir src/fidget/generated --target web
scripts.graph: vite build --logLevel error --config vite/graph.config.ts && node build/graph.cjs
